name: Optimize scanner throughput across representative repos

description: Baseline: scanner throughput harness over agent-ci, umami, astro, and openclaw with test+build checks
Precompile ignore regexes and switch discovery language lookup to a simple loop
Avoid a second TypeScript source file parse for logical LOC and count physical lines without text.split allocations
Disable AST parent links and pass variable names explicitly for anonymous function names
Disable AST parent links with explicit arrow-function names and path-based logging detection
Replace nested statement rescans in test mock setup extraction with a single-pass active-statement traversal
Skip hasAwait scans for non-async functions and skip duplicate fingerprints for test files
Skip hasAwait scans for non-async functions and avoid duplicate-signature fingerprints for test files
Remove parent-link helper dependencies so TypeScript ASTs can be created without parent pointers
Combine duplicate-fingerprint node counting and local-name collection into one traversal
Replace per-try subtree rescans with a single traversal that accumulates boundary categories for active try blocks
Disable TypeScript AST parent pointers after removing direct parent and getText helper dependencies
Skip test mock AST walks for test files whose text lacks any mock-related substrings
Match mock-related call paths from path segments before joining the full expression path string
Short-circuit await detection with a dedicated recursive search instead of the generic walk helper
Use synchronous file reads in the sequential scan loop to remove per-file promise overhead
Switch recursive discovery from async readdir to synchronous readdirSync
Avoid await overhead for synchronous provider and rule executions by only awaiting promise-like results
Cut hot-loop allocations in provider fact writes and weighted finding collection
Use object-backed fact buckets instead of inner Maps for repo, directory, and file fact lookups
Inline provider and rule execution per context to avoid singleton context-array allocations
Stop cloning durable fact sets on every file and trim retained fact buckets in one pass
Batch base file fact writes so each file bucket is initialized once per scan iteration
Rewrite getExpressionPath as an iterative path builder to avoid recursive array spreads
Initialize new file fact buckets with a null-prototype record instead of object spread
Rewrite file and directory score aggregation with object-backed accumulators and explicit loops
Replace function parameter map/filter and modifier some() calls with manual loops
Avoid path join allocations in try/catch boundary-category detection by matching key segment pairs directly
Replace comment regex matchAll iteration with a manual exec loop
Build duplicate-function serialization with a shared string-part buffer instead of per-node child strings
Use a shared string-parts buffer for test mock node-shape fingerprinting instead of recursive child-string joins
Stream duplicate-function serialization directly into the SHA-1 hash instead of joining a semantic-shape string first
